common.tagline: The first personal reading coach for kids

landing.heroTitle: A personal reading coach — for every child
landing.heroSubtitle: AI that listens to every child reading aloud, identifies what they're struggling with, and gives teachers actionable insights — at scale.
landing.ctaHint: Before you start, we'll ask for parent confirmation and agreement to our terms.
landing.feature1Desc: Your child picks a story at their level and reads it out loud into the device. Our speech recognition analyzes each word — in real time.
landing.feature2Desc: The system detects not just errors — but the type of error: letter substitution, skipped sounds, hesitation on long words. Like a speech therapist would.
landing.feature3Desc: A dashboard with a prioritized list of who needs attention this week, plus specific recommendations for what to work on.
landing.ageGateAdult: I am a parent / guardian / teacher (18+) and I have permission to register on behalf of the child.
landing.ageGateTerms: I have read and agreed to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, including consent to record the child's voice.
landing.ageGateError: Please confirm both items before signing in.
landing.ctaFinalSubtitle: Sign up free, create a profile for your child, and get immediate access to the story library and dashboard.

home.subtitle: Pick a child to start reading
home.trialWarning: {{days}} days left in your trial · Upgrade now to keep all features
home.restrictedBanner: Your trial has ended · Most features are locked. Upgrade to unlock them again.

pricing.title: Simple plans. Real value.
pricing.subtitle: Start with a 30-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
pricing.faqWhenChargedA: You won't be charged until your 30-day trial ends and you choose to continue with Premium.
pricing.faqCancelA: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time. Billing will stop at the end of your current month/year.
pricing.faqDataQ: What happens to my data if I cancel?
pricing.faqDataA: All of your children's data stays with you forever. If you come back, everything resumes where you left off.
pricing.devNotice: 💡 Development mode: Payment system is in mock state — clicking "Upgrade" will update your account locally without charging a card. When we finish the Stripe integration, the button will open the real payment page.

features.familyAccessFree: Free family access for parents of students
